values.location.main-intersection.title: Main Intersection
values.location.main-intersection.description: Four unlit corridors meet beneath a cracked navigation panel. Loose wiring hangs motionless in the vacuum.
values.action.replace-air-canister.title: Replace an Air Canister
values.action.replace-air-canister.description: Consume one spare canister to restore 50 suit air. The gauge must be half empty or lower.
values.action.replace-air-canister.success: The empty canister releases with a hard twist. The replacement seats, and the suit gauge climbs by half its full range.
values.action.replace-air-canister.failure: The coupling refuses to unlock. No air transfers from the spare canister.
values.action.cross-cryobay-airlock.title: Cross the Airlock
values.action.cross-cryobay-airlock.description: Leave the vented cryobay and spend suit air crossing into the dark junction.
values.action.cross-cryobay-airlock.success: Your boots lock and release across the threshold. Ten points vanish from the air gauge before you reach the main intersection.
values.action.cross-cryobay-airlock.failure: The outer hatch binds before you clear it. You retreat into the cryobay with the passage still blocked.
values.action.read-junction-map.title: Read the Junction Map
values.action.read-junction-map.description: Spend suit air tracing the surviving labels on the navigation panel.
values.action.read-junction-map.success: Emergency power reveals four routes: engineering, crew quarters, communications, and the captain's deck. Several intermediate compartments no longer answer.
values.action.read-junction-map.failure: The panel dies before its route labels stabilize.
values.action.trace-captain-deck-route.title: Trace the Captain's Route
values.action.trace-captain-deck-route.descript: Follow physical deck markings toward the captain's section while suit air falls.
values.action.trace-captain-deck-route.success: A faded command stripe turns into the starboard corridor. Scraped handprints continue along it where the gravity plating failed.
values.action.trace-captain-deck-route.failure: Broken wall panels interrupt the command stripe before its direction becomes clear.
values.action.inspect-intersection-damage.title: Inspect the Hull Damage
values.action.inspect-intersection-damage.descr: Use suit air checking the junction for the cause and direction of the breach.
values.action.inspect-intersection-damage.succe: The wall plates bend outward, away from the vessel's center. A narrow impact groove continues toward communications.
values.action.inspect-intersection-damage.failu: Layers of torn insulation conceal the damage beneath the outer plating.

privateNotes: The canisters now have an explicit finite refill action that consumes one canister and restores measurable suit air only when capacity is available. Airlock traversal and every vacuum investigation spend authoritative air, while the destination provides distinct finite choices.
